vulnerabilities.title: repostat: Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via repo prop in RepoCard
vulnerabilities.description:
### Impact
The `RepoCard` component is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The vulnerability occurs because the component uses React's `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` to render the repository name (`repo` prop) during the loading state without any sanitization. 

If a developer using this package passes unvalidated user input directly into the `repo` prop (for example, reading it from a URL query parameter), an attacker can execute arbitrary JavaScript in the context of the user's brow
